title: Trusting
description: Defines the rules for a mob to trust players.

trust_event.title: Trust Event
trust_event.description: Event to run when this entity becomes trusting. Can be an object with event and target properties, or a simple event string.

trust_items.title: Trust Items
trust_items.description: The list of items that can be used to get the entity to trust players. Can be an array or a single item string.

probability.title: Probability
probability.description: The chance of the entity trusting with each item use between 0.0 and 1.0, where 1.0 is 100%.
